items.raw_desc: Kollagén GreenFood Nutrition Collagen Beauty Forte, 90 kapszula:GreenFood Nutrition Collagen Beauty Forte90 + 20 capsulesEnzymatically hydrolysed German branded Collagen Viscofan® with high biological value and absorbability. Collagen hydrolysates (Viscofan® collagen peptides) are produced from cold-water fish, mainly salmon and cod, in a multi-step process that involves gelatinization and subsequent enzymatic hydrolysis of native collagen providing peptides with an average molecular weight (SMW) of approximately 3 kDa. Such a low molecular weight can only be achieved by cold hydrolysis of fish collagen. Such a low molecular weight is important for the absorbability of collagen. However, collagen is only absorbed by the human body if the body receives sufficient amounts of vitamin C, which is why Collagen Beauty Forte contains Acerola extract and Vitamin B3. items.raw_desc: Neszeszer Take it Shop kozmetikum rendszerező, nagy - fekete:Ez a praktikus és minőségi piperetáska férfiaknak és nőknek egyaránt tökéletes választás. Mindent magában foglal, amire utazás közben a fürdőszobában szükséged lehet. A táska több rekesszel rendelkezik, némelyik cipzáras. First unscrew the 4 Allen screws (M6 Allen No.5) and loosen the rear washer. Attach the stand to the rear structure, attach the washer from the other side and replace the 2 lower Allen screws and tighten lightly. Then position the upper strut with the clamp, insert the top 2 screws, position the stand accurately (check that the stand does not interfere with the rear wheel splash and the foot movement trajectory when pedalling) and tighten all 4 screws one by one. Then release the extendable foot on the folding leg of the stand and place it in the optimal position so that the bike stands on the stand by itself. Recommended to be installed in a professional service.
